— The Way of GhostChat —
What Is GhostChat

Chat Without
The World's Network

GhostChat is a fully offline chat application — it works over your local WiFi or Mobile Hotspot. No internet connection required. No SIM card needed. No network towers involved.

Like a genjutsu that exists only within a shared space — GhostChat creates a private communication world between people who are physically nearby.

One person acts as the Host, starting a server on their device. Others connect through the same WiFi Hotspot and chat in real time — completely isolated from the outside world.

📡
Zero Internet
Works entirely over local WiFi or Mobile Hotspot. No data consumed.
🔒
Private Rooms
Password-protected chat rooms. Only invited people can enter.
⚡
Real-Time
Instant messaging with live member count and notifications.
📱
Cross Platform
Desktop Windows app + Android APK. All connect together.
😊
Emoji Reactions
React to messages with 8 quick emojis. Tap to toggle.
✏️
Edit & Delete
Edit or delete your own messages. Changes sync instantly.
How It Works

The Ritual of Connection

I
The Host Awakens
One person opens GhostChat on their Windows PC and clicks "I will Be The Host". The server starts automatically inside the app. A popup reveals the secret IP address.
Windows Desktop App Required
II
Cast the Hotspot Jutsu
The host turns on their device's Mobile Hotspot. This creates a private local network — a genjutsu world accessible only to those nearby. No internet is needed or used.
Mobile Hotspot or Same WiFi Router
III
Others Enter the Realm
Friends connect their phones or PCs to the host's Hotspot. They open GhostChat on Android, enter the host's IP address shown in the popup, and enter their name.
All Devices on Same Network
IV
Create or Join a Room
Anyone can create a private room with an optional password, or join an existing one by name. Multiple rooms can exist simultaneously.
Up to 300 messages per room stored
V
The Genjutsu Begins
Real-time messages, emoji reactions, user avatars, sound notifications — all flowing through your local network. No internet. No data. No servers in the cloud. Just presence.
100% Offline · Zero Internet Usage
Download GhostChat

Choose Your Vessel

Windows · Desktop
🪟
GhostChat for Windows
The full desktop experience. Host a server directly from the app with one click. Share your IP with friends and start chatting instantly over your local network. Includes all features: rooms, reactions, edit/delete, themes, sound notifications.
Windows 10/11 v2.0.0 Electron
Windows may show a SmartScreen warning. Click "More info" → "Run anyway". GhostChat is open source and safe.
⬇ Download .exe
Android · Mobile
🤖
GhostChat for Android
The mobile companion. Connect to a Windows host over their Hotspot. Enter the host's IP address and join any room instantly. Optimized for touch — tap messages to react, slide drawer for rooms.
Android 7.0+ v2.0.0 Capacitor
Enable "Install from unknown sources" in Android settings before installing the APK.
⬇ Download .apk
